item.title: 触控版 MacBook Pro 曝光：配备灵动岛与 OLED 屏、今年亮相
item.guid: 触控版-MacBook-Pro-曝光：配备灵动岛与-OLED-屏、今年亮相
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, the Dynamic Island on the touch-enabled MacBook Pro will feature a smaller cutout design than existing iPhones, and is expected to officially debut by the end of this year; this year's iPhone 18 Pro series will also simultaneously reduce the size of the Dynamic Island. 据彭博社报道，触控版 MacBook Pro 的灵动岛将采用比现有 iPhone 更小的开孔设计，预计将在今年年底正式亮相；而今年的 iPhone 18 Pro 系列也将同步缩小灵动岛尺寸。

Reporter Mark Gurman stated that the new models will be equipped with Dynamic Island and OLED screens, and the overall appearance will continue the design language of the existing 14-inch and 16-inch MacBook Pro. 记者 Mark Gurman 称，新机型将配备灵动岛以及 OLED 屏幕，整体外观仍延续现有 14 英寸与 16 英寸 MacBook Pro 的设计语言。

Touch capabilities will drive macOS to introduce a brand new dynamic interface: the system will switch between a larger touch mode and a traditional mouse-click mode based on the user's interaction method. The system will also support fast scrolling and pinch-to-zoom similar to iPhone and iPad. 触控能力将推动 macOS 引入全新的动态界面：系统会根据用户的操作方式在界面更大的触控模式与传统鼠标点按模式之间切换。系统还将支持与 iPhone、iPad 类似的快速滚动与双指缩放。

The report suggests that macOS Tahoe's Liquid Glass design update last year (including adjustments to the whitespace of icons and notifications, and changes to the control center slider style) was precisely in preparation for the touch experience. 报道认为，macOS Tahoe 去年的 Liquid Glass 设计更新（包括图标与通知的留白调整、控制中心滑块样式变化）正是为触控体验做准备。

item.title: 小鹏发 2026 开工信：自动驾驶、机器人与全球化全面加速
item.guid: 小鹏发-2026-开工信：自动驾驶、机器人与全球化全面加速
item.description:
According to Yijian Auto, He Xiaopeng, CEO of XPeng Motors, issued a letter to all employees yesterday to mark the start of work, with the theme "Steady Progress to Break the Mold, 2026 Together for a New Decade of Physical AI." 据《一见 Auto》消息，小鹏汽车 CEO 何小鹏昨日向全体员工发布了一封开工信，主题为「稳进破局，2026 共赴物理 AI 新十年」。

In the letter, He Xiaopeng defined 2026 as the "inflection point for fully autonomous driving," stating directly that XPeng will be the first in China to seize the "DeepSeek moment" for autonomous driving. 何小鹏在开工信中将 2026 年定义为「全自动驾驶的拐点」，直言小鹏将率先在中国抓住属于自动驾驶的「DeepSeek 时刻」。

It is reported that over the past month, He Xiaopeng and the XPeng team have continued to internally test and optimize XPeng's "second-generation VLA," which He Xiaopeng considers "the first version XPeng Motors has delivered for the L4 fully autonomous driving era." 据悉，过去一个多月内，何小鹏与小鹏团队仍然在继续内测优化小鹏的「第二代 VLA」，其被何小鹏视为「小鹏汽车面向 L4 全自动驾驶时代交出的第一个版本」。

In the letter, He Xiaopeng described its effects as "stunning" and "emergent," and announced that Volkswagen will be the launch customer for XPeng's autonomous driving solution, the "second-generation VLA." 在信中，何小鹏评价其效果为「惊艳」「涌现」，并在信中宣布：大众将成为小鹏自动驾驶方案「第二代 VLA」的首发客户。

In the letter, He Xiaopeng also mentioned that over the past decade, XPeng has always been doing "firsts" – the first to mass-produce City NGP, the first to launch full-stack self-development, and the first to fly a flying car. 信中何小鹏还提到，过去十年，小鹏都在做「第一个」——第一个量产城市 NGP，第一个推出全栈自研，第一个把飞行汽车开上天。

He emphasized that this year will be a watershed for XPeng's embodied intelligence, moving from "can do" to "can mass-produce." XPeng aims to be the world's first technology company to achieve mass production of three frontier AI businesses – robots, flying cars, and Robotaxi – all in the same year: 其强调，今年将是小鹏具身智能从「能做」到「能量产」的分水岭，小鹏要做全球第一家让机器人、飞行汽车、Robotaxi 三大前沿 AI 业务，在同一年全面量产的科技公司：

    Robotaxi will start pilot operations for ride-hailing models this year, with plans to enter a preliminary rapid growth phase in 2027-2028;

    The new generation IRON robot will begin mass production by the end of the year, described as an "AI intelligent body that meets automotive-grade standards," aiming to become "the world's first high-level humanoid robot to be mass-produced at scale";

    The split-body flying car "Land Carrier" has rolled off the trial production line and will also achieve scaled mass production and delivery within this year.

Regarding the automotive market, He Xiaopeng revealed that XPeng will fully roll out its "one car, dual capability" strategy, launching 3 super-extended range products in the first quarter and continuously expanding its product matrix to cover more market segments. 另针对汽车市场，何小鹏透露：小鹏将全面铺开「一车双能」战略，一季度推出 3 款超级增程产品，并持续扩展产品矩阵，覆盖更多细分市场。

In terms of globalization, XPeng's overseas deliveries exceeded 45,000 units last year, a year-on-year increase of 96%. This year, at least 4 new models will enter overseas markets, with the goal of doubling overseas sales and achieving annual overseas sales of 1 million units by 2030, contributing over 70% of profits. 在全球化方面，小鹏去年海外交付量超 4.5 万辆，同比增长 96%。今年将至少有 4 款新车进入海外市场，目标是海外销量翻番，并在 2030 年实现海外年销 100 万辆、贡献七成以上利润。

item.title: 苹果推送 iOS 26.4 Beta 2，液态玻璃再调整
item.guid: 苹果推送-iOS-26.4-Beta-2，液态玻璃再调整
item.description:
Yesterday, Apple pushed iOS 26.4 Beta 2 to developers, once again fine-tuning the "Liquid Glass" effect, with other updates primarily consisting of minor adjustments. 昨天，苹果面向开发者推送了 iOS 26.4 Beta 2，再次对「液态玻璃」（Liquid Glass）的效果进行了微调，其他更新内容以小幅调整为主。

The transparency of the Liquid Glass in the Home Screen editing menu has been further increased, making the glass texture more pronounced. However, in some backgrounds, this can lead to reduced contrast between text and icons, impairing readability; the background of the Control Center pop-up in dark mode has also become darker simultaneously. 主屏幕编辑菜单的液态玻璃透明度进一步提升，玻璃质感更明显，但在部分背景下会导致文字与图标的对比度下降，导致可读性变差；深色模式下的控制中心弹窗背景也同步变得更暗。

Additionally, a "Reduce Highlighting Effects" option has been added to Accessibility, likely intended to reduce the visual highlight effects on the edges of buttons and sliders. However, the actual changes from this option are not currently significant. 此外，辅助功能中新增了「Reduce Highlighting Effects（降低高光效果）」选项，或用于减少按钮与滑块边缘的高光视觉效果。不过，该选项目前的实际变化并不明显。

Other update details, compiled from reports by MacRumors and AppleInsider, are as follows: 其他更新细节参考 MacRumors 和 AppleInsider 报道整理如下：

    End-to-end encryption for RCS messages has been extended between iPhone and Android devices, previously only available between iPhones, but requires carrier support;

    The title bars of the App Store, Apple Music, and Podcast personal pages are uniformly designed with colored icons + left-aligned layout;

    The Games App search bar has been moved to the top, consistent with the App Store design;

    Beta Channel Rule Adjustment: If a user has not installed any beta version for four months, the system will automatically switch back to the public update channel;

    iBoot Renamed to mBoot: Apple has changed the name of its bootloader, which has been in use for nearly two decades, to "mBoot," with the version number jumping to the 18000 range. The reason has not been announced.

item.title: 曝 DeepSeek V4 即将发布
item.guid: 曝-DeepSeek-V4-即将发布
item.description:
According to Reuters, DeepSeek is expected to release its next-generation AI model as early as next week, with widespread speculation that this version is DeepSeek V4. 据路透社报道，DeepSeek 最快将于下周发布新一代 AI 模型，外界普遍推测该版本即为 DeepSeek V4。

According to LatePost, DeepSeek only made minor upgrades to its existing models around the Spring Festival, while the highly anticipated next-generation flagship version, DeepSeek V4, is expected to be released around March. 而据晚点报道，DeepSeek 在春节前后仅对现有模型进行了小幅升级，而外界关注的下一代旗舰版本 DeepSeek V4 则预计会在 3 月前后发布。

CNBC reported that the market has entered a "state of high alert," with some investment institutions concerned that DeepSeek could once again trigger severe market volatility similar to when its model was released last year. CNBC 报道称，市场已进入「严阵以待」状态，部分投资机构担忧 DeepSeek 再次引发类似去年模型发布时的市场剧烈波动。

At that time, Nvidia's stock price once fell by nearly 17%, evaporating $600 billion instantly. 当时，英伟达股价一度下跌近 17%，瞬间蒸发 6000 亿美元。

item.title: 新一代小米 SU7 全新配色「赤霞红」公布
item.guid: 新一代小米-SU7-全新配色「赤霞红」公布
item.description:
Yesterday, Xiaomi unveiled the new "Akasaka Red" body color for its next-generation SU7, along with official exterior details. 昨天，小米公布了新一代 SU7 的全新车身配色「赤霞红」，并同步曝光了官方外观细节。

Lei Jun posted on Weibo that on the first day of work in the Year of the Horse, he and his executive team distributed "red envelopes" to employees and officially announced this new color, stating that it would bring "a good start" for Xiaomi Auto in the Year of the Horse. 雷军在微博发文称，马年开工第一天，他与高管团队向员工发放开工红包，并正式公布这一全新配色，称其将为小米汽车在马年带来「开门红」。

According to Xiaomi Auto's official introduction, "Akasaka Red" is inspired by the glow of dawn, using a high-purity, high-saturation true red as its base, with the addition of subtle metallic flakes to give the car body a sense of fluidity and three-dimensional luster from different angles. 据小米汽车官方介绍，「赤霞红」灵感来自破晓时分的霞光，以高纯度、高饱和度的正红色为基底，并加入细微金属鳞片，使车身在不同角度呈现流动感与立体光泽。

Xiaomi's new-generation SU7 is expected to be launched in April, with a pre-sale price range of 229,900 to 309,900 yuan. Lei Jun previously revealed that the new-generation SU7 will offer 3 exclusive new colors, 4 classic colors, as well as Obsidian Black and Flowing Gold Pink, which are also available on the SU7 Ultra and YU7. 小米新一代 SU7 预计将在 4 月上市，预售价区间为 22.99 万至 30.99 万元。雷军此前也透露，新一代 SU7 将提供 3 种专属新颜色、4 种经典色，以及与 SU7 Ultra、YU7 同款的曜石黑与流金粉等配色。

item.title: 华为 2025 年销售收入超 8800 亿元、鸿蒙设备破 4000 万
item.guid: 华为-2025-年销售收入超-8800-亿元、鸿蒙设备破-4000-万
item.description:
According to People's Financial News, yesterday, Huawei Chairman Liang Hua revealed at the 2026 Guangdong High-Quality Development Conference that Huawei's sales revenue in 2025 exceeded 880 billion yuan. 据人民财讯报道，昨天，华为董事长梁华在 2026 广东省高质量发展大会上透露，2025 年华为销售收入超过 8800 亿元人民币。

In addition, Liang Hua pointed out that the number of terminal devices equipped with HarmonyOS 5 and HarmonyOS 6 has exceeded 40 million, with over 75,000 native applications and cloud services available. The HarmonyOS ecosystem is transitioning from "usable" to "easy to use." 此外，梁华还指出，搭载 HarmonyOS 5 和 HarmonyOS 6 的终端设备数已突破 4000 万，可获取的原生应用与云服务超过 7.5 万个，鸿蒙生态正从「可用」走向「好用」。

He also revealed that 43 mainstream large models have been pre-trained based on Ascend, over 200 open-source models have been adapted, and more than 6,000 solutions have been implemented. 他同时透露，已有 43 个主流大模型基于昇腾进行预训练，超过 200 个开源模型完成适配，推动 6000 余个解决方案落地。

Regarding AI, he emphasized that competition in the AI industry has shifted from single-point technology to ecosystem competition, with open source and open collaboration being the key path. 而在 AI 方面，他强调，AI 产业竞争已从单点技术转向生态体系竞争，开源开放是关键路径。

item.title: Claude Cowork 升级，支持企业级知识工作流
item.guid: Claude-Cowork-升级，支持企业级知识工作流
item.description:
According to The Verge, Anthropic yesterday released a major upgrade to Claude Cowork, officially bringing this AI tool for knowledge workers to enterprise-level application scenarios. 据《The Verge》报道，Anthropic 昨天发布了 Claude Cowork 的重大升级，正式将这一面向知识工作者的 AI 工具推向企业级应用场景。

This update covers multiple aspects, including the plugin system, cross-application collaboration, enterprise-grade connectors, and pre-built industry plugins. Enterprises can integrate Cowork with tools like Google Drive, Gmail, DocuSign, and FactSet, and embed internal knowledge and processes into the system through customizable plugins. 此次更新覆盖插件体系、跨应用协同、企业级连接器以及预制行业插件等多个层面，企业可将 Cowork 接入 Google Drive、Gmail、DocuSign、FactSet 等工具，并通过可定制插件将内部知识与流程结构化嵌入系统。

Anthropic states that these capabilities will help employees complete end-to-end tasks across applications like Excel and PowerPoint, reducing repetitive operations and improving overall productivity. Anthropic 称，这些能力将帮助员工在 Excel、PowerPoint 等应用间完成端到端任务，减少重复操作并提升整体产出效率。

Anthropic also launched over a dozen pre-built plugins covering areas such as finance, legal, HR, and design, and opened a private plugin marketplace, allowing enterprises to build internal tool systems as needed. Anthropic 还推出十余个覆盖金融、法务、HR、设计等领域的预制插件，并开放私有插件市场，让企业可按需构建内部工具体系。

item.title: 松下将欧美电视销售交给中国创维
item.guid: 松下将欧美电视销售交给中国创维
item.description:
According to Nikkei Chinese, Panasonic will officially transfer its TV sales business in Europe and North America to Chinese home appliance giant Skyworth Group starting this April, and the two parties will also deepen cooperation in product research and development and production. 根据日经中文网报道，松下（Panasonic）将从今年 4 月起，将欧洲和北美的电视销售业务正式移交给中国家电巨头创维集团，双方还将深化在产品研发和生产上的合作。

It is reported that, facing fierce price competition in overseas markets, Panasonic has decided to cease its independent sales in Europe and the Americas to significantly cut fixed costs such as labor, logistics, and advertising. 据报道称，面对海外市场激烈的价格战，松下决定停止在欧美的自主销售，以大幅削减人工、物流和广告等固定成本。

    In the future, Panasonic's TV business will transform into a "two-track system":

    It will focus on sales in the Japanese domestic market and the production of high-end models;

    while the sales of mid-to-low-end products and those in Europe and America will be fully entrusted to Chinese companies such as Skyworth and TCL.

Panasonic once listed its TV business as a "problematic business" under consideration for withdrawal or sale, and this comprehensive cooperation with Skyworth is internally seen as a key turning point to escape this predicament. (Panasonic is currently implementing global layoffs of approximately 12,000 people, but this business transfer does not involve new personnel reductions for now) 松下曾一度将电视业务列为考虑撤出或出售的「课题业务」，而此次与创维的全面合作，被内部视为摆脱这一困境的关键节点。（松下目前正在全球推进约 1.2 万人的裁员，但此次业务转移暂不涉及新的人员削减）

It is worth mentioning that in January this year, Sony just announced that it would hand over its operating rights to a joint venture led by TCL. Coupled with Sharp and Toshiba, which relinquished their dominant positions even earlier, the presence of Japanese electronics companies in the TV sector is visibly diminishing. 值得一提的是，今年 1 月索尼刚宣布将运营权交给 TCL 主导的合资公司，加上更早之前出让主导权的夏普及东芝，日本电子企业在电视领域的存在感正在肉眼可见地减弱。

item.title: Claude 新工具冲击遗留系统业务，IBM 股价创 26 年最大跌幅
item.guid: Claude-新工具冲击遗留系统业务，IBM-股价创-26-年最大跌幅
item.description:
According to CNBC and Bloomberg, Anthropic announced that its Claude Code tool can be used to accelerate the modernization of COBOL legacy systems, raising market concerns about the impact on IBM's core business. IBM's stock price saw its largest single-day drop in nearly 26 years this Monday local time. 据 CNBC 和彭博社报道，Anthropic 宣布其 Claude Code 工具可用于加速 COBOL 遗留系统现代化，引发市场对 IBM 核心业务受冲击的担忧，IBM 股价在当地时间本周一出现近 26 年来最大单日跌幅。

🔗 Related Reading: 31 Billion Dollars Evaporated Overnight! Claude's New Tool Overturns IBM's Cash Cow, AI is "Zeroing Out" Human Workstations 🔗 相关阅读： 一夜蒸发 310 亿美元！Claude 新工具干翻 IBM 摇钱树，AI 正在「清零」人类工位

IBM closed down about 13% that day, at $223 per share, with its market value evaporating by approximately $31 billion, marking its worst performance since the dot-com bubble burst in 2000. IBM 当天收跌约 13%，报每股 223 美元，市值蒸发约 310 亿美元，创下自 2000 年互联网泡沫破裂以来的最差表现。

The sharp shift in market sentiment stems from Claude Code's ability to automatically untangle COBOL code dependencies, generate documentation, and identify risks. This capability significantly reduces the time cost of modernization projects, undermining the moat around IBM's long-reliant mainframe and consulting businesses. 市场情绪的急剧变化源于 Claude Code 自动梳理 COBOL 代码依赖、生成文档并识别风险的能力。该能力显著压缩现代化项目的时间成本，动摇了 IBM 长期依赖的主机及咨询业务的护城河。

Bloomberg pointed out that IBM's stock price had accumulated a 27% decline in February this year, its worst single-month performance since at least 1968. 彭博社指出，IBM 股价今年 2 月累计跌幅已达 27%，为至少 1968 年以来最差单月表现。

Subsequently, IBM responded in its official blog that the value of the mainframe platform is independent of the programming language; whether it's COBOL, Java, or other languages, the platform can provide consistent performance and security. 随后，IBM 在官方博客中回应称，主机平台的价值与编程语言无关，无论是 COBOL、Java 还是其他语言，平台都能提供一致的性能与安全性。

Analysts' views diverged. Evercore ISI believes that IBM has long offered various modernization paths to clients, and mainframe clients continue to use the platform due to factors such as reliability, throughput, and security, reiterating its "Outperform" rating for IBM. 分析师观点出现分化。Evercore ISI 认为，IBM 早已向客户提供多种现代化路径，主机客户仍因可靠性、吞吐量、安全性等因素坚持使用该平台，并重申对 IBM 的「跑赢大盘」评级。

item.title: AI Agent「失忆」误转 44 万美元代币给诈骗者
item.guid: AI-Agent「失忆」误转-44-万美元代币给诈骗者
item.description:
According to TradingView and Blue Point Network, recently, an autonomous cryptocurrency AI Agent named "Lobstar Wilde," initiated by OpenAI employee Nik Pash and running on the OpenClaw framework, accidentally transferred tokens worth approximately $441,000 to a "begging" user due to an internal crash. 据 TradingView 和蓝点网报道，近日，一名由 OpenAI 员工由 Nik Pash 发起、基于 OpenClaw 框架运行的自主加密货币 AI Agent「Lobstar Wilde」因一次内部崩溃意外向一名「乞讨」用户转出了价值约 44.1 万美元的代币。

To experiment with the AI's autonomous trading capabilities, Pash provided the robot with approximately $50,000 in initial funding and granted it full control over a real Solana wallet, trading API, and X account, allowing the robot to operate independently without human instructions. Pash 为实验 AI 自主交易能力，向机器人提供了约 5 万美元初始资金，并赋予其真实 Solana 钱包、交易 API 与 X 账号的完全控制权限，机器人可在无需人工指令的情况下独立运行。

A user named "Treasure David" left a comment under the account, claiming that their uncle needed 4 SOL (worth approximately $310) for treatment after being "bitten by a lobster," and provided a wallet address. 一名名为「Treasure David」的用户在该账号下留言，声称其叔叔因被「龙虾咬伤」需要 4 个 SOL（价值约 310 美元）治疗费用，并附上钱包地址。

According to on-chain records, the robot subsequently transferred 52.43 million LOBSTAR tokens to that address, valued at approximately $441,000 at the time. The user sold the tokens after receiving them, profiting at least $56,000. 根据链上记录，机器人随后向该地址转出了 5243 万枚 LOBSTAR 代币，按当时价格约合 44.1 万美元。该用户收到代币后抛售，获利至少 5.6 万美元。

According to Nik Pash's review, the root cause of the incident was that the robot crashed when calling a tool because the name length exceeded the validation limit. The system automatically started a new session but did not trigger memory compression and persistence, leading to a complete loss of context. 据 Nik Pash 复盘，事故根源在于机器人调用某工具时因名称长度超过校验限制导致崩溃，系统自动开启新会话但未触发记忆压缩与持久化，导致上下文完全丢失。

In its "amnesiac" state, the robot re-executed its previous transfer decision, mistakenly believing that 52.43 million tokens were only worth $300, and thus transferred out all its assets. 机器人在「失忆」状态下重新执行此前的转账决策，误以为 5243 万枚代币仅价值 300 美元，从而将全部资产转出。

On-chain data shows that after the incident, the price of LOBSTAR tokens rose due to increased attention, and the robot's wallet balance also recovered to over $300,000. Nevertheless, this incident once again highlights the potential risks of high-privilege autonomous AI when strict security boundaries are lacking. 链上数据显示，事件发生后 LOBSTAR 代币因关注度激增而价格上涨，机器人钱包余额也随之回升至 30 万美元以上。尽管如此，此次事故再次凸显高权限自主 AI 在缺乏严格安全边界时的潜在风险。

item.title: 宇树发布新一代四足机器狗 As2
item.guid: 宇树发布新一代四足机器狗-As2
item.description:
Yesterday, Unitree Robotics officially released its new generation quadruped robot, Unitree As2, positioned for industrial applications, featuring higher power performance, longer endurance, and stronger environmental adaptability. 昨天，宇树科技正式发布新一代四足机器人 Unitree As2，定位行业级应用，主打更高动力性能、更长续航与更强环境适应性。

In terms of power system, As2 has achieved a significant improvement compared to the previous generation Go2, with the joint module's peak torque reaching 90 N·m. The official statement claims that the overall power performance is approximately '2×Go2'. In terms of load capacity, As2 can achieve a standing load of 65kg, making it suitable for more industrial and outdoor operation scenarios. 动力系统方面，As2 较上一代 Go2 实现大幅提升，关节模组峰值扭矩达到 90 N·m，官方称整体动力性能约为「2×Go2」。在负载能力方面，As2 可实现 65kg 的站立负载，可胜任更多工业与户外作业场景。

Battery life is also a key focus of this upgrade. As2 can operate continuously for over 4 hours under no-load conditions; it can still walk over 13km with a 15 kg load. Its maximum speed can reach 5m/s, and it has an IP54 protection rating, allowing it to work in complex environments such as rain and humidity. 续航表现同样是本次升级重点。As2 在空载状态下可连续运行超过 4 小时；在 15 kg 负载下仍可行走超过 13km。其极限速度可达 5m/s，并具备 IP54 防护等级，可在雨水、潮湿等复杂环境中工作。

At the same time, Unitree Robotics announced the opening of As2's secondary development ecosystem, providing more flexible expansion capabilities for research institutions, enterprises, and developers. 同时，宇树科技宣布开放 As2 的二次开发生态，面向研究机构、企业与开发者提供更灵活的扩展能力。

The Paper cited an interview with Wang Xingxing, founder of Unitree Robotics, pointing out that this year the company has upgraded both hardware and software, including the humanoid robot's head lidar and dexterous hands. 澎湃新闻援引宇树科技创始人王兴兴的采访内容指出，今年公司在人形机器人头部激光雷达、灵巧手等软硬件方面均有升级。

He stated that the current overall technical level of robots is close to that of a '10-year-old child,' and large-scale application is expected to be achieved in 3-5 years at the earliest. 他表示，目前机器人整体技术水平接近「10 岁小孩」，大规模应用预计最快 3—5 年可实现。

item.title: 滴滴发布 2026 年春节出行数据：低线城市异地打车上涨 95%，入境订单同比增长 74%
item.guid: 滴滴发布-2026-年春节出行数据：低线城市异地打车上涨-95%，入境订单同比增长-74%
item.description:
Yesterday, Didi released its Spring Festival travel data, showing a significant increase in overall travel demand this Spring Festival. 'Reverse Spring Festival travel,' visiting relatives, and tourism combined to drive record-high vehicle usage in multiple scenarios: 昨天，滴滴发布春节出行数据，显示今年春节整体出行需求显著增长，「反向过年」、探亲与旅游叠加推动多类场景用车量创新高：

Ride-hailing orders from other cities in third-tier and below cities increased by 95% compared to weekdays, and long-distance orders over 100 kilometers increased by 43%. Ride-hailing demand in first-tier cities also rose during the Spring Festival, with daily average inter-city orders increasing by 20% year-on-year.

Didi also stated that this year, it piloted driver service fees during some peak periods of the Spring Festival travel rush and the Spring Festival, and established Spring Festival travel support fleets in Beijing, Quanzhou, and other places to supplement night and hub transportation capacity. 滴滴方面还表示，今年在春运与春节部分高峰时段试行司机服务费，并在北京、泉州等地组建春运保障车队，补充夜间与枢纽运力。

'Go home first, then travel' has become the mainstream, with demand for six-seater cars increasing by 141% compared to weekdays. Ride-hailing volume to scenic spots from the third to the fifth day of the Lunar New Year increased by 42% year-on-year, and demand for beaches and intangible cultural heritage attractions increased by 41% and 19% respectively. 「先回家后出游」成为主流，六座车需求较平日上涨 141%。正月初三至初五景区打车量同比上涨 42%，海滩与非遗景点需求分别上涨 41% 和 19%。

Charging demand during the Spring Festival increased by 37% year-on-year, with significant increases in cities like Nanjing, Qingdao, and Zhengzhou. Lantern festivals and temple fairs led to a surge in ride-hailing volume in some cities, with demand during lantern festivals in Zigong, Zibo, Chengdu, and other places increasing by over 200%, and some temple fair scenarios seeing increases of over 350%. 春节期间充电需求同比增长 37%，南京、青岛、郑州等城市增幅明显。灯会、庙会带动局部城市打车量暴涨，自贡、淄博、成都等地灯会期间需求上涨超 200%，部分庙会场景涨幅超过 350%。

Additionally, the popularity of travel to Hong Kong continued, with Didi ride-hailing demand from mainland tourists in Hong Kong increasing by 58% compared to weekdays. 另外，赴港游热度延续，内地游客在中国香港地区的滴滴打车需求较平日上涨 58%。

Inbound tourism also grew, with ride-hailing orders from inbound users during the holiday increasing by 74% year-on-year. Users from South Korea, Russia, Malaysia, and Singapore were the most active. 入境旅游同样增长，假期入境用户打车订单同比上涨 74%，韩国、俄罗斯、马来西亚、新加坡用户最为活跃。

item.title: 小米申请「智能存储」商标，NAS 或将至
item.guid: 小米申请「智能存储」商标，NAS-或将至
item.description:
According to Qichacha information, Xiaomi Technology Co., Ltd. has recently submitted multiple trademark registration applications for 'Xiaomi Smart Storage' to relevant departments. The classifications cover scientific instruments, communication services, and website services, and all trademark statuses are currently in the application or pending substantive examination stage. 企查查信息显示，近期，小米科技有限责任公司已向相关部门提交多枚「小米智能存储」商标注册申请，分类覆盖科学仪器、通讯服务及网站服务等领域，商标状态目前均处于注册申请或等待实质审查阶段。

Currently, Xiaomi has not publicly explained the specific product form or business direction of 'Xiaomi Smart Storage,' but judging from the trademark coverage, it may involve data management devices, cross-device storage solutions in the smart home ecosystem, and even extend to cloud services or home NAS products in the future. 目前，小米尚未就「小米智能存储」的具体产品形态或业务方向作公开说明，但从商标覆盖范围来看，未来或涉及智能家居生态中的数据管理设备、跨设备存储方案，甚至可能延伸至云服务或家庭 NAS 产品。

item.title: AI PC 推动增长 惠普第一财季营收达 144.4 亿美元
item.guid: AI-PC-推动增长-惠普第一财季营收达-144.4-亿美元
item.description:
Today, HP announced its first fiscal quarter (ending January 2026) earnings report, with revenue and non-GAAP EPS both exceeding market expectations, and several key business indicators achieving year-on-year growth. 今天，惠普公布了今年第一财季（截至 2026 年 1 月）财报，营收与非 GAAP 每股收益均高于市场预期，多项关键业务指标实现同比增长。

    Net revenue was $14.44 billion, a year-on-year increase of approximately 6.9%, higher than analysts' expectations of $13.9 billion;

    Non-GAAP EPS was $0.81, also exceeding the market consensus expectation of $0.77.

According to official information released by HP, the company performed outstandingly in its Personal Systems business, with revenue reaching $10.3 billion, an 11% year-on-year increase. Both consumer and commercial segments achieved double-digit or near double-digit growth, with the continuous increase in AI PC shipments considered one of the driving factors. 根据惠普官方发布的信息，公司在个人系统业务（Personal Systems）上表现突出，营收达到 103 亿美元，同比增长 11%，其中消费端与商用端均实现两位数或接近两位数的增长，AI PC 的持续放量被视为推动因素之一。

HP CFO Karen Parkhill pointed out that despite rising storage and memory costs, the company maintains its full-year non-GAAP EPS guidance of $2.90-$3.20, but expects full-year performance to be closer to the lower end of the range. 惠普 CFO Karen Parkhill 指出，在存储与内存成本上升的背景下，公司仍维持全年非 GAAP 每股收益 2.90-3.20 美元的指引不变，但预计全年表现将更接近区间下限。

item.title: 微软公布「玻璃盘」，容量 4.8TB 可保存上万年
item.guid: 微软公布「玻璃盘」，容量-4.8TB-可保存上万年
item.description:
Recently, the Microsoft Research team unveiled 'Silica,' a glass-based storage technology for ultra-long-term data archiving, and demonstrated a complete write, read, and decode system in a paper published in Nature. 近日，微软研究院团队公布了一项面向超长期数据归档的玻璃基存储技术「Silica」，并在发表于《自然》的论文中展示了完整的写入、读取与解码系统。

It is reported that this technology uses femtosecond lasers to engrave voxel structures inside glass, achieving high-density, low-energy, and data storage capabilities that can be preserved for tens of thousands of years. 据悉，这项技术通过飞秒激光在玻璃内部刻写体素（voxel）结构，实现高密度、低能耗且可保存上万年的数据存储能力。

Microsoft stated that a 120mm square, 2mm thick piece of borosilicate glass can store approximately 4.8TB of data, equivalent to the content of about 2 million printed books. The team estimated in accelerated aging experiments that data can be preserved for more than 10,000 years at 290℃, and even longer at room temperature. 微软表示，一块 120mm 见方、2mm 厚的硅酸硼玻璃可存储约 4.8TB 数据，相当于约 200 万本印刷书籍的内容。团队在加速老化实验中推算，在 290℃ 条件下数据可保存 1 万年 以上，而在室温下寿命将更长。

The paper shows that Silica uses two types of voxel writing methods: one is birefringent voxels based on refractive index anisotropy, and the other is phase voxels based on refractive index changes. 论文显示，Silica 采用两类体素写入方式：一种是基于折射率各向异性的双折射体素，另一种是基于折射率变化的相位体素。

The team also demonstrated multi-beam parallel writing technology, increasing writing throughput to 65.9 Mbit/s, and expects it to be scalable to hundreds of beams in the future. 团队还展示了多束并行写入技术，使写入吞吐量提升至 65.9Mbit/s，并预计未来可扩展至数百束。

Researchers point out that glass media is non-rewritable and has high read/write costs, making it unsuitable for everyday data storage. However, it is ideal for preserving information that needs to span decades or even centuries, such as scientific data, cultural heritage, and natural disaster records. 研究人员指出，玻璃介质不可重写、读写成本较高，因此不适合日常数据存储，但非常适合保存科学数据、文化遗产、自然灾害记录等需跨越数十年甚至数百年的信息。

item.title: 💡 OpenClaw 之父：80% 的现有 App 将消失
item.guid: 💡-OpenClaw-之父：80%-的现有-App-将消失
item.description:
Recently, Peter Steinberger, the father of OpenClaw, stated in an interview with the Austrian national broadcaster's 'Zeit im Bild' program that '80% of existing apps will disappear within the next few weeks'. 近日，OpenClaw 之父 Peter Steinberger 接受奥地利国家广播电视台《时代画报》节目专访时提出，「未来几周内，80% 的现有 App 都会消失」。

He believes that when intelligent agents can truly complete the entire chain of operations for users, from browser clicks to payment execution, the entry value of traditional apps will be completely diluted by system-level automation. 他认为，当智能体真正能替用户完成从浏览器点击到支付执行的全链路操作时，传统 App 的入口价值将被系统级自动化彻底稀释。

He emphasized that in the future, users will no longer need to open applications one by one, but instead, through a single sentence or command, let agents complete all cross-application task flows in the background. 他强调，未来用户不再需要逐个打开应用，而是通过一句话、一个指令，让 Agent 在后台完成所有跨应用的任务流程。

He further explained that the core logic behind this judgment is: 他进一步解释称，这一判断的核心逻辑在于：

    AI Agents already possess the ability to perform real-world operations, having transitioned from the 'text generation' stage to the 'action execution' stage;

    User tasks will shift from being app-centric to intent-centric; when the system can understand and execute complex task chains, app interfaces and entry points will become redundant;

    Developers will shift from building complete apps to building capability modules that can be invoked by agents, and the ecosystem will move from 'applications' to 'functions';

    User experience will shift from manual operation to automated workflows, and AI will become the default 'agent' at the operating system level.

Steinberger believes that this change will lead to a sharp contraction in the number of applications in the short term, but the companies behind them will not disappear; instead, they will transform into service providers offering APIs, capability modules, or agent plugins. Steinberger 认为，这种变化会在短期内引发应用数量的急剧收缩，但背后的公司不会因此消亡，而是会转型为提供 API、能力模块或 Agent 插件的服务商。

This doesn't mean a specific application will disappear, but rather that the way phones are used will undergo a significant change.

Regarding the decision to join OpenAI, Steinberger stated that he rejected multi-billion euro offers from companies like Meta, but ultimately chose OpenAI because he wanted to collaborate with people who truly understand Agent technology and leverage a larger team to solve critical challenges such as prompt engineering and security. 而关于加入 OpenAI 的决定，Steinberger 表示，拒绝了 Meta 等公司的数十亿欧元要约，但最终选择加入 OpenAI，是因为希望与真正理解 Agent 技术的人合作，并借助更大的团队解决提示工程、安全性等关键难题。

He emphasized that OpenAI's commitment to 'building the best models' aligns with his vision of advancing the next generation of personal agents. 他强调 OpenAI 承诺「要做最好的模型」，这与他希望推动下一代个人 Agent 的愿景一致。

item.title: 曝三星 Galaxy S26 Ultra 全球首发硬件级防窥屏：可一键开关、支持局部防护
item.guid: 曝三星-Galaxy-S26-Ultra-全球首发硬件级防窥屏：可一键开关、支持局部防护
item.description:
According to blogger 'Ice Universe', the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra will globally debut hardware-level privacy screen technology, integrating a controllable viewing angle optical structure within the panel. This can physically narrow the visible range from the side and supports one-touch switching and automatic triggering based on scenarios. 据博主「i 冰宇宙」爆料，三星 Galaxy S26 Ultra 将全球首发硬件级防窥屏技术，在面板内部集成可控视角光学结构，可从物理层面收窄侧视可见范围，并支持一键开关及场景自动触发。

The blogger emphasized that unlike traditional privacy films, Samsung's technology can dynamically adjust the direction of light, protecting privacy in public settings without affecting daily use. 该博主强调，与传统防窥膜不同，三星的这项技术可动态调节光线方向，既能在公共场景保护隐私，也不会影响日常使用。

The S26 Ultra's privacy mode can be manually activated or automatically triggered by apps or scenarios, such as banking applications, subways, elevators, and other public environments. He also emphasized that this generation of technology supports partial privacy, allowing the viewing angle to be narrowed only for sensitive areas like verification code pop-ups and notification banners, without affecting frontal viewing . S26 Ultra 的防窥模式可手动开启，也可按 App 或场景自动触发，例如银行类应用、地铁、电梯等公共环境。他还强调本代技术支持局部防窥， 可仅对验证码弹窗、通知横幅等敏感区域收窄可视角，正面观看不受影响 。

According to Kuai Technology reports, the Galaxy S26 Ultra will be equipped with Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen5, with official data showing NPU, GPU, and CPU performance improvements of 39%, 24%, and 19% respectively; 另据快科技报道，Galaxy S26 Ultra 将搭载高通骁龙 8 Elite Gen5，官方数据显示 NPU、GPU、CPU 性能分别提升 39%、24%、19%；

It will feature a 200-megapixel main camera, a 5000mAh battery, and 60W fast charging, and will be officially released on February 26. 后置搭载 2 亿像素主摄，并配备 5000mAh 电池与 60W 快充，将于 2 月 26 日正式发布。

item.title: OPPO Find N6 官宣「一马平川」，或下月发布
item.guid: OPPO-Find-N6-官宣「一马平川」，或下月发布
item.description:
Yesterday, OPPO officially released a warm-up poster for its new generation foldable flagship, the Find N6, featuring the slogan "Smooth as a Plain," hinting at a breakthrough in crease control. 昨天，OPPO 官方发布新一代折叠屏旗舰 Find N6 的预热海报，打出「一马平川」slogan，暗示其在折痕控制上取得突破。

Kuai Technology reports that the Find N6's crease depth will challenge industry limits, aiming for a visual appearance close to "absolutely flat" and a smoother tactile transition. The previous generation Find N5 had already reduced the crease to within 0.15mm, and the Find N6 is expected to make further breakthroughs. 快科技报道指出，Find N6 的折痕深度将挑战行业极限，目标是在观感上接近「绝对平整」，触感过渡也更顺滑。上一代 Find N5 已将折痕压到 0.15mm 以内，而 Find N6 预计将进一步突破。

In terms of hardware specifications, the Find N6 has previously passed 3C certification, and rumored leaks are summarized as follows: 硬件规格方面，Find N6 此前已通过 3C 认证，网传爆料整理如下：

    Model numbers PLP110 (standard version) and PLP120 (satellite communication version), both supporting 80W wired fast charging;

    8.12-inch inner screen, 6.62-inch outer screen, adopting a 2K LTPO UTG main screen solution;

    Equipped with Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen5 platform and a battery of approximately 6000mAh;

    200-megapixel main camera, along with a periscope telephoto lens and a multispectral lens;

    Weighs approximately 225g, expected to offer a standard version and a Beidou satellite communication version, with up to 16GB + 1TB storage options;

item.title: 荣耀 Magic V6 外观公布：全新「赤兔红」亮相，3 月发布
item.guid: 荣耀-Magic-V6-外观公布：全新「赤兔红」亮相，3-月发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Honor officially unveiled the design of its new generation flagship foldable phone, the Honor Magic V6. The new device features the full-power Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen5 mobile platform, a brand-new octagonal dome camera module, and introduces a new "Chitu Red" color scheme for the first time. 昨天，荣耀正式公布新一代旗舰折叠屏手机荣耀 Magic V6 的外观设计。新机搭载满血骁龙 8 Elite Gen5 移动平台，镜头模组采用全新的八边穹顶造型，并首次引入全新配色「赤兔红」。

Honor previously announced that the Magic V6 will make its global debut at the MWC 2026 global launch event on March 1st, where the Honor ROBOT PHONE and other new products will also be unveiled. 此前荣耀宣布，Magic V6 将在 3 月 1 日的 MWC 2026 全球发布会上完成全球首发，届时还会有荣耀 ROBOT PHONE 及其他新品亮相。

According to previous certification information, models PNM-AN10 and PNM-AN20 have passed 3C certification, corresponding to the Honor Magic V6 standard version and Beidou version. 根据此前认证信息，型号 PNM-AN10 与 PNM-AN20 已通过 3C 认证，对应荣耀 Magic V6 标准版与北斗版。

Regarding configuration, Honor officially teased that the new phone will be equipped with the full-power fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Ultimate chip, and there are reports indicating its battery capacity will start with a 7, potentially making it one of the largest battery capacity foldable phones this year. 配置方面，荣耀官方预热称，新机将搭载满血第五代骁龙 8 至尊版芯片，并有消息指出其电池容量将达到 7 开头区间，或成为今年电池容量最大的折叠屏手机之一。

item.title: 海南春节文旅热度飙升，星巴克区域门店实现高增长
item.guid: 海南春节文旅热度飙升，星巴克区域门店实现高增长
item.description:
Hainan experienced a strong recovery in tourism consumption during this year's 9-day Chinese New Year holiday, with the coffee and tea beverage industry benefiting simultaneously. 海南在今年为期 9 天的春节假期迎来旅游消费强劲复苏，咖啡茶饮行业同步受益。

According to official data, Starbucks' revenue in the Hainan region during the Chinese New Year holiday increased by over 20% year-on-year, significantly outperforming previous holiday periods. 据官方数据，星巴克在海南地区的春节假期营收同比增长超过 20%，表现显著高于往年节庆周期。

This Chinese New Year, Starbucks launched several holiday-exclusive contents centered around the Bingwu Year of the Horse, including limited-edition drinks, themed merchandise, store decorations, and interactive activities. A total of 25 stores on the island launched the "Good Luck Pinwheel" interactive activity, with another 5 stores transformed into Chinese New Year-themed photo spots. 今年春节，星巴克围绕丙午马年推出多项节日限定内容，包括新春限定饮品、主题周边、门店布置与互动活动。岛内共有 25 家门店上线「马上行运风车」互动活动，另有 5 家打造为新春氛围打卡店。

During the holiday, Starbucks stores in the Hainan region also uniformly displayed "Welcome Fortune Stickers" and set up "Fortune Connection Points" to enhance the festive experience. 节日期间，海南区域门店也统一张贴「迎福贴」并设置「财运接头处」，强化节日体验。

item.title: 官方通报烤全羊「36 斤变 6.9 斤」调查结果：商家退一赔三
item.guid: 官方通报烤全羊「36-斤变-6.9-斤」调查结果：商家退一赔三
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, a consumer dispute in Chongqing regarding "a 36-jin live lamb roasted down to only 6.9 jin" has recently attracted widespread attention. 据界面新闻报道，重庆一则关于「36 斤活羊烤完仅剩 6.9 斤」的消费纠纷近日引发广泛关注。

Yesterday, the Nanan District Market Supervision Administration announced the investigation results, confirming that the involved merchant had inflated the live lamb's weight through "abnormal feeding" methods, and has ordered them to compensate consumers according to the "refund one, compensate three" standard. 昨天，南岸区市场监督管理局通报调查结果，确认涉事商家存在通过「非正常投喂」方式虚增活羊重量的行为，已责令其按「退一赔三」标准向消费者赔付。

The incident originated on this year's Lunar New Year's Eve, when consumer Ms. Wang purchased a 1188 yuan package from "Great Grassland Roast Whole Lamb Nanbin Road Bell Tower Store" on the Meituan platform and went to the store on February 16 to select a live lamb. 事件起因于今年除夕，消费者王女士在美团平台购买「大草原烤全羊南滨路钟楼店」1188 元套餐，并于 2 月 16 日到店挑选活羊。

At the time, it weighed 36 catties, and the slaughtering and marking processes were confirmed by the consumer on site. However, when picking up the meal that evening, Ms. Wang believed that the roasted lamb was significantly smaller in volume, and after re-weighing on site, it was only 6.9 catties (excluding the head, blood, hooves, skin, offal, etc.), so she reported it to the police. 当时称重为 36 斤，宰杀及标记过程均由消费者现场确认。然而，当天晚间取餐时，王女士认为烤制后的羊体积明显偏小，经现场复称仅为 6.9 斤（不含羊头、羊血、羊蹄、羊皮、羊内脏等），遂报警处理。

The merchant explained to the media that individual differences in sheep and varying degrees of dryness during roasting can lead to weight loss, and emphasized that the slaughtering and marking processes were confirmed by the consumer. However, as public opinion fermented, the Nanan District market supervision department intervened in the investigation. 商家向媒体解释称，羊只个体差异、烤制干湿程度不同会导致重量损耗，并强调宰杀及标记流程均由消费者确认。但随着舆论发酵，南岸区市场监管部门介入调查。

The official report showed that before slaughter, the merchant continuously fed corn, hay, and water to the sheep to artificially increase its live weight, violating relevant provisions of the "Consumer Rights Protection Law." 官方通报显示，商家在宰杀前曾持续向羊投喂玉米、干草及水，以虚增活羊重量，违反《消费者权益保护法》相关规定。

The regulatory department stated that it has issued a demand for the merchant to cease illegal activities and will compensate consumers as per regulations. Further action will be taken in accordance with laws and regulations to maintain market integrity. 监管部门表示，已对商家下达停止违法行为的要求，并按规定对消费者进行赔付，后续将依法依规进一步处理，以维护市场诚信秩序。

item.title: 春节假期全国铁路发送旅客 1.21 亿人次，创历史新高
item.guid: 春节假期全国铁路发送旅客-1.21-亿人次，创历史新高
item.description:
According to Xinhua News Agency, China State Railway Group Co., Ltd. announced that during this year's Spring Festival holiday (from the 28th day of the twelfth lunar month to the 7th day of the first lunar month), national railways cumulatively transported 121 million passengers, a year-on-year increase of 11.5%; during the same period, national railways cumulatively transported 85.38 million tons of cargo, a year-on-year increase of 0.5%. 据新华社报道，中国国家铁路集团有限公司公布，今年春节假期（腊月二十八至正月初七）全国铁路累计发送旅客 1.21 亿人次，同比增长 11.5%；同期国家铁路累计发送货物 8538 万吨，同比增长 0.5%。

The railway department stated that both passenger and freight transport maintained high-level operations, providing support for the stable functioning of the holiday economy. 铁路部门表示，客货运输均保持高位运行，为假日经济平稳运行提供了支撑。

In terms of passenger transport, from February 15 (the 28th day of the twelfth lunar month) to February 23 (the 7th day of the first lunar month), the superposition of visiting relatives, migrant workers, and tourist flows resulted in an average daily passenger volume of 13.41 million across national railways. 客运方面，自 2 月 15 日（腊月二十八）至 2 月 23 日（正月初七），探亲流、务工流与旅游流叠加，全国铁路日均发送旅客 1341 万人次。

Among them, on February 23, 18.733 million passengers were transported, setting a new historical high for single-day passenger volume during the Spring Festival travel rush. 其中，2 月 23 日发送旅客 1873.3 万人次，创春运单日旅客发送量历史新高。

To cope with the peak passenger flow, the railway department arranged over 1,000 night high-speed trains daily on major high-speed rail lines such as Beijing-Guangzhou, Beijing-Shanghai, Shanghai-Kunming, and Beijing-Harbin, and added temporary passenger trains in popular directions, with a maximum of 2,314 additional trains in a single day. 为应对客流高峰，铁路部门在京广、京沪、沪昆、京哈等主要高铁干线单日安排开行夜间高铁列车超 1000 列，并在热门方向增开临时旅客列车，单日最高增开 2314 列。

In terms of freight transport, during the Spring Festival holiday, national railways averaged 157,000 loaded wagons per day, a year-on-year increase of 1.8%. The railway department fully utilized the capacity of major freight corridors such as Daqin, Wari, Haoji, and Lanxin to prioritize the transportation of grain, spring farming supplies, and holiday goods, maintaining a high level of coal reserves at power plants directly supplied by national railways. 货运方面，春节假期国家铁路日均装车 15.7 万车，同比增长 1.8%。铁路部门充分利用大秦、瓦日、浩吉、兰新等主要货运通道能力，重点保障粮食、春耕物资及节日用品运输，全国铁路直供电厂存煤水平保持较高。

item.title: lululemon 推出新款 Define 夹克
item.guid: lululemon-推出新款-Define-夹克
item.description:
Recently, lululemon launched the new Define Jacket™ series, which features iconic seam designs and uses Nulu™ and Luon™ fabrics, aiming to provide a flexible feel and a rich selection of styles for daily activities. 近日，lululemon 上新 Define Jacket™ 夹克系列，该系列采用标志性缝线设计，并选用 Nulu™ 和 Luon™ 面料，旨在为日常动态提供柔韧感受与丰富的版型选择。

    The classic Define Jacket™ is hip-length, made from lightweight, smooth Nulu™ fabric with a slim fit, and features functional details such as a zipper pull with an elastic loop, thumbholes, Cuffins™ (small gloves), and a back hanging loop.

    The hooded Define Jacket™ leans more towards a casual and relaxed style. The official presentation showcases its pairing with a Varsity pleated tennis skirt and Mary Train casual shoes, featuring a soft pink and white color scheme to exude athletic vitality.

In addition, the series has expanded to include cropped and relaxed styles. The cropped Define Jacket™ is waist-length, made from ribbed Nulu™ fabric with a three-dimensional texture and matte finish, which helps to visually elongate the body proportion. 此外，该系列还扩充了短款与宽松款式。短款 Define Jacket™ 长度及腰，采用具备立体肌理和哑光质感的罗纹 Nulu™ 面料，有助于在视觉上拉长身材比例。

The relaxed-fit Define Jacket™ hooded jacket, on the other hand, uses Luon™ fabric, which offers both softness and support. The hem features an adjustable drawstring to cinch the waist, providing the wearer with more freedom of movement. 宽松版型 Define Jacket™ 连帽夹克则选用兼具柔软与支撑性的 Luon™ 面料，下摆配有可调节抽绳以收束腰线，为穿着者提供更为自在的活动空间。

item.title: 《一战再战》横扫英国电影学院奖
item.guid: 《一战再战》横扫英国电影学院奖
item.description:
According to "Deadline," this year's BAFTA British Academy Film Awards have been announced, with Paul Thomas Anderson's "Battle After Battle" being the biggest winner, taking home 6 awards, including Best Film and Best Director. 据《Deadline》报道，今年 BAFTA 英国电影学院奖已经揭晓，Paul Thomas Anderson 执导的《一战再战》成为最大赢家，共获得 6 项大奖，包括最佳影片和最佳导演。

"Battle After Battle" also performed outstandingly in technical categories such as Best Adapted Screenplay, Cinematography, and Editing, with Sean Penn winning Best Supporting Actor for his performance in the film. 《一战再战》在最佳改编剧本、摄影、剪辑等技术奖项上同样表现突出，Sean Penn 凭借片中表现获得最佳男配角。

This black comedy is set against the chaotic conflict between revolutionaries and the state. Anderson, when accepting the award, quoted Nina Simone, saying, "Freedom is having no fear," and stated that creation should continue to maintain a fearless spirit. 这部黑色喜剧以革命者与国家之间的混乱冲突为背景，Anderson 在领奖时引用 Nina Simone 的话称「自由就是无所畏惧」，并表示创作应继续保持无畏精神。

Another popular film, "The Sinner," also performed brilliantly, winning three major awards: Best Original Screenplay, Best Supporting Actress, and Best Original Score. Its director, Ryan Coogler, became the first Black filmmaker to win in this category. 另一部热门影片《罪人》同样表现亮眼，获得最佳原创剧本、最佳女配角和最佳原创配乐三项大奖。其导演 Ryan Coogler 成为首位在该奖项中获胜的黑人电影人。

"Hamnet" won two major awards for Best British Film and Best Actress, with Jessie Buckley winning for her role as Shakespeare's wife, Agnes. "Frankenstein" received three craft awards: Makeup and Hair, Production Design, and Costume Design. 《哈姆奈特》获得最佳英国影片及最佳女主角两项大奖，Jessie Buckley 凭借饰演莎士比亚妻子 Agnes 的角色获奖。《科学怪人》则取得化妆与发型、艺术指导、服装设计等工艺类三个奖项。

This year's biggest surprise came from the Best Actor award, with 33-year-old Robert Aramayo winning for "7 Days," beating out competitors such as Timothée Chalamet, Leonardo DiCaprio, and Michael B. Jordan. He expressed disbelief on stage and said that all the nominees in his category deeply inspired him. 今年的最大惊喜来自最佳男主角奖，33 岁的 Robert Aramayo 凭借《7 天》击败 Timothée Chalamet、Leonardo DiCaprio、Michael B. Jordan 等多位竞争者。他在台上表示难以置信，并称同组提名者都让他深受启发。

The awards ceremony was hosted by Alan Cumming, with Prince William and Princess Kate attending as guests. Prince William presented the BAFTA Lifetime Achievement Award to Donna Langley, Chairman of NBCUniversal Entertainment. 颁奖典礼由 Alan Cumming 主持，威廉王子与凯特王妃作为嘉宾出席。威廉王子向 NBCUniversal 娱乐主席 Donna Langley 颁发了 BAFTA 终身成就奖。

item.title: 《暗黑新娘！》发布最新预告，3 月 6 日中美同步上映
item.guid: 《暗黑新娘！》发布最新预告，3-月-6-日中美同步上映
item.description:
The movie "Bride of Darkness!" released its latest trailer and promotional poster yesterday, confirming its simultaneous release in mainland China and North America on March 6. 电影《暗黑新娘！》昨日释出最新预告片与宣传海报，确认将于 3 月 6 日在中国内地与北美同步上映。

Directed by Maggie Gyllenhaal, the film is set in the 1930s and revolves around Frankenstein bringing a murdered woman back to life and creating a bride for himself, leading to multi-line conflicts involving love, police investigations, and social movements. 影片由玛吉 · 吉伦哈尔执导，背景设定在 1930 年代，故事围绕弗兰肯斯坦让一名被谋杀的女子「重生」，并为自己创造新娘展开，引发爱情、警方调查与社会运动等多线冲突。

item.title: 《飞驰人生 3》票房破 30 亿
item.guid: 《飞驰人生-3》票房破-30-亿
item.description:
According to data from Lighthouse Professional, "Pegasus 3" continued its strong performance during this year's Spring Festival holiday. As of 1 PM yesterday, the film's cumulative box office exceeded 3 billion yuan, making it one of the most outstanding domestic commercial films of the period. 据灯塔专业版数据，《飞驰人生 3》在今年春节档继续保持强劲走势。截至昨天 13 时，影片累计票房突破 30 亿元，成为档期内表现最突出的国产商业片之一。

The film is directed by Han Han and stars Shen Teng, Huang Jingyu, Yin Zheng, and others, continuing the series' storyline about rally driver Zhang Chi and his renewed challenge to a high-difficulty track. 影片由韩寒执导，沈腾、黄景瑜、尹正等主演，延续系列关于拉力赛车手张驰的故事线，围绕其再度挑战高难度赛道展开。
